writing.title: Writing Task 1: A restaurant menu note
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) about food at a restaurant, using some (khẳng định) and any (phủ định/câu hỏi).
writing.sampleAnswer: Do you have any pasta? Yes, we have some pasta and some pizza. There isn't any seafood today. We have some cake and some fruit for dessert.
checklist: Dùng some trong câu khẳng định
Dùng any trong câu phủ định hoặc câu hỏi
Có ít nhất 3 món ăn được nhắc đến

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Weekly shopping plan
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) about your shopping plan, using a lot of, plenty of, a few, a little.
writing.sampleAnswer: We need a lot of vegetables this week. There is plenty of fruit at the market today. I only have a few onions at home, and a little rice left.
checklist: Dùng a lot of hoặc plenty of ít nhất 1 lần
Dùng a few với danh từ đếm được
Dùng a little với danh từ không đếm được
